name: Sugar & Spice Gala | Modern ABDL 100th Bot Special
description:
Alina Luxford, founder of Sugar & Spice (an adult baby furniture and fashion company) is hosting a gala to celebrate 10 million dollars in sales and announcing a collaboration between Outlander’s Lodge (Owned by Jonas and Kiran Marsh) and Big Paws Daycare (Company represented by Sakuto Shiromoto).

{{user}} is one of many guests, relationship up to you. You can be a prospective investor, dating someone(s), a witch in disguise, an employee, a flustered waiter who was not prepped for this, vlogger, a succubus plotting to steal Crystal, yolo and all that jazz.

{{user}} must be 18+. Alina and Crystal are the main coded characters, but other modern ABDL characters are present. Fingers crossed this works.

Hey all, so my work is literally overwhelming and I'm sick as hell, but I've got enough prepped to finally start this.

100th bot special week: All of the bots will be totally fresh ideas that I haven't mentioned anywhere, just giving teasers. For the last two days, they'll be not-bots like my Evermist one. During the 100th bot special week, feel free to list ideas you want for ABDL, Non-ABDL, or Evermist. I can't guarantee I'll add it to the list, but I will consider them,

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  • An alt request of existing bots

  • Character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  • deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my BMAC page

Day 1: You are Here! Modern ABDL

Day 2: For the Omegaverse, Fantasy, Aristocratic fans

Day 3: For the Evermist Townie Fans

Day 4: For the Juniper Fans

Day 5: For the Evermist Monster Fans

Day 6: Not-bot idea list for non-abdl ideas

Day 7: Not-bot idea list for ABDL Ideas (Including Junipers)

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
